extract: Energy Ball (Japanese: エナジーボール Energy Ball) is a damage-dealing Grass-type move introduced in Generation IV. It is: TM53 in Generations IV through Pokémon Ultra Sun and Ultra Moon, and in Pokémon Brilliant Diamond and Shining Pearl. TR65 in Pokémon Sword and Shield. TM119 in Pokémon Scarlet and Violet. TM026 in Pokémon Legends: Z-A.
